assets.alt: Flat liquid-glass founder profile panel connected to buyer signal and outbound cards on a calm blue and mint mesh background
assets.notes: Generated with Codex image generation and saved to the owned post asset directory.
assets.final_prompt: Create a 1600x700 Sell In Public blog hero image. Flat premium B2B editorial image, no text, no logos. Subject: choosing an agency for founder-led LinkedIn content tied to sales. Show a central founder profile card connected to a voice-capture panel, post drafts, buyer-signal nodes, account cards, and outbound follow-up paths. Include a subtle evaluation checklist/grid with abstract marks only, no readable labels. Style: matte liquid-glass panels, warm off-white background, graphite lines, muted teal, deep green, soft coral, and electric blue signal accents. Professional, spacious, inspectable, no people photos, no typography, no LinkedIn logo.
